description: An operator needs to record the time they spent working on a specific operation of a work order.

nodes.task_description: Identify the work order and the specific operation number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly selects the work order and operation they just completed.

nodes.task_description: Enter the start and end times or the total duration of the work.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the time spent on the task.

nodes.task_description: Submit the labor ticket and verify it has been posted to the work order's cost ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the labor cost has been added to the work order.
